sairConfirm.descricao: You will be signed out. Unsaved changes will be lost.

3.title: Review & Publish
3.desc: Review, edit and publish the job

header.descEditarDepois: and save your changes. Charlie is still around to help refine the fields.
header.descNova: Build the briefing at your own pace. Whenever you need, open Charlie — he offers suggestions and refines the fields with you.

validacao.obrigatoriosEmBranco: {{count}} required field(s) left blank — I highlighted them in red.
validacao.obrigatoriosDescricao: You can fill them in now or continue anyway.

dialog.cancelarEdicaoDescricao: The changes made to this job will be discarded and cannot be recovered.
dialog.cancelarCriacaoDescricao: You are about to cancel creating this job. All progress will be lost and cannot be recovered.
dialog.salvarRascunhoDescricao: The information you filled in is kept so you can pick up editing this job whenever you want.
dialog.republicarDescricao: Your changes will be saved and the job will be republished, accepting applications again.
dialog.publicarEdicaoDescricao: The information will be saved and the job will be published, starting to accept applications.
dialog.publicarDescricao: The job will be published and start accepting applications.

identidade.title: Job identity
identidade.desc: How this position sits within the organization.

sobre.title: About the job
sobre.desc: The context of the challenge and the goal of the hire — the opening of the description.

operacao.title: Operations & routine
operacao.desc: Where, when and at what pace this person will work.

investimento.title: Investment
investimento.desc: The salary range and benefits that make this job competitive.

processo.title: Selection process
processo.desc: The stages of the selection, in order — what applicants will go through.

requisitos.title: Technical requirements
requisitos.desc: What this person needs to master right from the start.

diferenciais.title: Nice-to-haves
diferenciais.desc: Knowledge that counts in their favor but isn't a blocker.

responsabilidades.title: Responsibilities & profile
responsabilidades.desc: The day-to-day of the role and the kind of person you're looking for.

cliente.label: Client / Project
cliente.hint: Client or internal project this job belongs to.

desafio.label: About the challenge
desafio.hint: The scenario where the job is born — the team/project and the moment.
desafio.placeholder: Ex: Estamos expandindo o time de engenharia do TIS Talent AI Platform para sustentar o crescimento da plataforma.

objetivo.label: Goal of the job
objetivo.hint: What this hire needs to achieve.
objetivo.placeholder: Ex: Ampliar a capacidade de entrega de soluções backend de alta performance, garantindo escalabilidade e qualidade nas integrações da plataforma.

processo.label: Process stages
processo.hint: Select the stages and order the sequence with the arrows.

perfil.templateAvisoResto: Review and adjust each field to match the project's reality before moving on.

formacao.label: Education / Schooling
formacao.hint: Accepted level and fields of study.
formacao.placeholder: Ex: Superior completo em Ciência da Computação ou áreas correlatas.

experiencia.label: Required experience
experiencia.hint: Minimum amount and type of experience required.
experiencia.placeholder: Ex: Mínimo 3 anos em desenvolvimento backend com Python e APIs RESTful.

stackObrigatoria.label: Required tech stack
stackObrigatoria.hint: Without it, the profile won't pass screening.
stackObrigatoria.vazio: No technologies — add some or ask Charlie.

conhecimentos.label: Nice-to-have knowledge
conhecimentos.hint: Counts in their favor, but doesn't block.

responsabilidades.label: Duties and responsibilities
responsabilidades.hint: One per sentence — they become bullets in the generated description.
responsabilidades.placeholder: Ex: Desenvolver e manter APIs RESTful. Realizar code reviews. Mentorar pessoas.

habilidades.label: Soft skills
habilidades.hint: The kind of person you're looking for (optional).

justificativa.label: Hiring justification
justificativa.hint: Why this job exists — free context for approval.
justificativa.placeholder: Ex: Expansão do produto X para novo cliente — necessidade de reforço técnico no time de backend.

chips.sheetDescricao: Search and check the items. Changes apply instantly; close when you're done.
chips.limparDescricao: The {{count}} items in this field will be removed.

select.selecioneOpcao: Select an option from the list.

charlie.descricaoSr: Suggestions and chat to help you build the job.
charlie.vazio: Use a suggestion above or write a message.
charlie.inputPlaceholder: Describe the job or ask a question…
charlie.limparDescricao: The entire history of this conversation with Charlie will be deleted.
charlie.saudacao: Hi! I'm Charlie. I saw you selected {{nivel}} and {{modelo}} in {{local}}.{{budget}}
charlie.saudacaoBudget: The budget is still blank — want a market range?
charlie.respostaPadrao: Got it! In this demo I don't actually fill anything in, but this is where I'd distribute what I recognized across the fields.

review.tomTitulo: Choose the tone of the description.
review.melhorarToast: Charlie enhanced the description. Tweak it by hand if you like.
review.resolvaPendencias: Resolve the pending items to approve the job.
review.novaVagaDescricao: The data filled in for this job will be discarded and cannot be recovered.

copy.erroCopiar: Couldn't copy — select and copy manually.
copy.publicarManual: Use this content when publishing manually.

doc.placeholderResumo: Write a summary of the job.
doc.placeholderDesafio: Describe the context of the challenge.
doc.placeholderObjetivo: Describe the goal of the hire.
